title: Customers With Highest Spending
description: Find customers whose total spending is equal to the highest total spending among all customers.
sql_solution: SELECT customer_id FROM (SELECT customer_id, SUM(amount) total FROM orders GROUP BY customer_id) WHERE total = (SELECT MAX(total) FROM (SELECT SUM(amount) total FROM orders GROUP BY customer_id));
pyspark_solution:
from pyspark.sql.functions import *

customer_totals = orders.groupBy("customer_id").agg(sum("amount").alias("total"))
max_total = customer_totals.agg(max("total").alias("max_total"))

result = (
    customer_totals.crossJoin(max_total)
    .filter(col("total") == col("max_total"))
    .select("customer_id")
)
